info.name: HRM SaaS Platform API
info.description: Complete API collection for HRM SaaS Platform with multi-tenancy support. Includes authentication, user management, attendance tracking, invitations, and audit logs.

request.description: Run this first to set up your environment variables

query.description: Filter by status: active, suspended, pending

request.description:
List all organizations/tenants (Superuser only)

**Query Params:**
- `page`: Page number
- `page_size`: Items per page (default: 20)
- `status`: Filter by status (active, suspended, pending)
- `search`: Search by name or slug

**Filters:**
- `name`: Organization name (exact)
- `name_contains`: Partial name match
- `slug`: Slug (exact)
- `timezone`: Timezone filter
- `public_signup_enabled`: Boolean filter
- `created_days`: Created within X days
- `search`: Global search

**Ordering:**
- `ordering`: name, -name, created_at, -created_at

Create a new tenant organization (Superuser only)

**Request Body:**
- `organization_name`: Organization name
- `subdomain`: Unique subdomain/slug
- `email`: Admin user email
- `password`: Admin password (min 8 chars)
- `first_name`: Admin first name
- `last_name`: Admin last name
- `phone`: Admin phone number (optional)
Get details of a specific tenant
Update tenant details (Superuser only)
Activate a suspended tenant
Suspend an active tenant
Delete a tenant (use with caution - drops schema)
Get all users for a specific tenant

Authenticate with email and password

**Request Body:**
- `email`: User email address
- `password`: User password

**Response:**
- `access`: JWT access token (expires in 60 minutes)
- `refresh`: JWT refresh token (expires in 7 days)
- `user`: User object with roles

**Note:** The access token is automatically saved to the `accessToken` variable for use in subsequent requests.
Refresh access token using refresh token

Logout and optionally blacklist refresh token

**Request Body:**
- `refresh`: Refresh token (optional - blacklists if provided)
Get current authenticated user details

Update current user profile

**Updatable Fields:**
- `first_name`: First name
- `last_name`: Last name
- `phone`: Phone number

Change password for authenticated user

**Request Body:**
- `old_password`: Current password
- `new_password`: New password (min 8 chars)

Request password reset email

**Request Body:**
- `email`: User email address
- `redirect_url`: Frontend redirect URL for password reset

**Note:** Always returns success to prevent email enumeration

Reset password with token from email

**Request Body:**
- `uid`: Base64 encoded user ID
- `token`: Password reset token from email
- `new_password`: New password (min 8 chars)

query.description: Users who logged in within X days

request.description:
List all users (HR/Admin only - Employees see only themselves)

**Filters:**
- `search`: Global search (email, name, phone)
- `email`: Exact email match
- `email_contains`: Partial email
- `first_name`, `last_name`: Name filters
- `is_active`: Active status
- `is_tenant_admin`: Tenant admin status
- `role`: Role name (exact)
- `joined_after`: Join date after (YYYY-MM-DD)
- `last_login_days`: Last login within X days
- `never_logged_in`: Users who never logged in

**Ordering:**
- `ordering`: email, -email, date_joined, -date_joined, last_login, -last_login

Create a new user (HR/Admin only)

**Request Body:**
- `email`: User email (required, unique)
- `password`: User password (required, min 8 chars)
- `first_name`: First name (required)
- `last_name`: Last name (required)
- `phone`: Phone number (optional)
- `is_tenant_admin`: Tenant admin flag (optional, default: false)
Get details of a specific user
Update user details (HR/Admin only)
Soft delete user (sets is_active=false, Admin only)

List all roles

**Filters:**
- `search`: Global search (name, description)
- `name`: Exact name match
- `name_contains`: Partial name
- `is_system_role`: System role flag
- `description`: Partial description

**Ordering:**
- `ordering`: name, -name, created_at, -created_at

Create a new custom role (Admin only)

**Request Body:**
- `name`: Role name (required, unique)
- `description`: Role description (optional)
Get details of a specific role
Update role details (Admin only)
Delete a custom role (Admin only, system roles cannot be deleted)

Assign a role to a user (Admin only)

**Request Body:**
- `user_id`: User ID (UUID)

Revoke a role from a user (Admin only)

**Request Body:**
- `user_id`: User ID (UUID)

List attendance records (HR/Admin see all, Employees see own)

**Filters:**
- `today`: Today's records only
- `this_week`: This week's records
- `this_month`: This month's records
- `date_gte`: Date from (YYYY-MM-DD)
- `date_lte`: Date to (YYYY-MM-DD)
- `month`: Month number (1-12)
- `year`: Year (YYYY)
- `status`: present, absent, half_day, late
- `user_email`: Filter by user
- `has_checkin`: Has check-in (true/false)
- `has_checkout`: Has check-out (true/false)

**Ordering:**
- `ordering`: date, -date, checkin_time, -checkin_time, created_at, -created_at

Check in for the day

**Request Body:**
- `location`: Optional location object
  - `latitude`: Latitude
  - `longitude`: Longitude
- `notes`: Optional check-in notes

Check out for the day

**Request Body:**
- `location`: Optional location object
- `notes`: Optional check-out notes

Get current user's attendance history

**Query Params:**
- `start_date`: Start date (YYYY-MM-DD)
- `end_date`: End date (YYYY-MM-DD)

Get current user's monthly attendance statistics

**Query Params:**
- `month`: Month number (1-12), defaults to current month
- `year`: Year (YYYY), defaults to current year

**Response includes:**
- Total days, working days
- Present, absent days
- Half days, late days
- Total hours, average hours per day
Get organization attendance settings

Update attendance settings (Admin only)

**Request Body:**
- `work_start_time`: Work start time (HH:MM)
- `work_end_time`: Work end time (HH:MM)
- `grace_period_minutes`: Grace period in minutes
- `break_duration_minutes`: Break duration in minutes
- `overtime_enabled`: Enable overtime calculation
- `overtime_start_after_minutes`: Overtime starts after X minutes

query.description: Filter by status: pending, accepted, cancelled, expired
Filter valid invitations (pending and not expired)

request.description:
List all invitations (HR/Admin only)

**Filters:**
- `status`: pending, accepted, cancelled, expired
- `email`: Exact email match
- `is_valid`: Valid (pending and not expired)
- `is_expired`: Expired invitations
- `created_days`: Created within X days
- `invited_by_email`: Filter by inviter

**Ordering:**
- `ordering`: created_at, -created_at, expires_at, -expires_at

Create and send email invitation (HR/Admin only)

**Request Body:**
- `email`: Recipient email (required)
- `first_name`: Recipient first name (required)
- `last_name`: Recipient last name (required)
- `role_names`: Array of role names to assign (optional)
- `custom_message`: Custom message for email (optional)

**Note:** Invitation expires in 72 hours
Get details of a specific invitation
Cancel a pending invitation (Creator or Admin only)
Resend invitation email

Accept invitation and create user account (Public endpoint)

**Request Body:**
- `token`: Invitation token (UUID from email)
- `password`: New user password (min 8 chars)

**Response:**
- `access`: JWT access token
- `refresh`: JWT refresh token
- `user`: Created user object

item.name: 7. Audit Logs

request.description:
List audit logs (Admin only)

**Filters:**
- `action`: Filter by action (user.login, user.created, etc.)
- `target_model`: Target model (User, Role, etc.)
- `user_email`: Filter by user
- `timestamp_days`: Within X days ago
- `ip_address`: Filter by IP address

**Ordering:**
- `ordering`: timestamp, -timestamp, action, -action
Get details of a specific audit log entry

item.description: Audit trail and compliance logging (Admin only)

request.description:
Get organization-wide statistics (HR/Admin only)

**Response includes:**
- Total users
- Active users (last 30 days)
- Roles count
- Today's attendance summary
Get organization settings

Update organization settings (Admin only)

**Request Body:**
- `timezone`: Organization timezone (IANA format)
- `workdays`: Array of workdays (mon, tue, wed, thu, fri, sat, sun)
- `monthly_required_days`: Required working days per month
- `public_signup_enabled`: Enable public signup

variable.description: Superuser JWT Token for platform admin
